name: Story of Sun Wukong

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Seven Means of Immortality
abilities.text: During the start phase of turn 4, if this model was hired into this crew and it is not in play because it was killed, summon this model within 3" of any friendly model. It does not gain a Slow token.

actions.name: Ruyi Jingu Bang
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may place anywhere within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Whirlwind Attack
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)2" of this model.

actions.name: Biting Insult
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Pilfer
triggers.text: Target must drain a (fortitude). If it does so, infuse a (fortitude).

actions.name: Leap
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Journey to the West
triggers.text: Choose an ally within 2". Place the chosen model in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Speed of a Meteor
triggers.text: Immediately, increase the Rg of this action by +2".

triggers.name: I Can Dig It
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.
